debug_info.goal:
case succ.cons
α : Type u_1
elt : α
idx' : ℕ
HR :
  ∀ {l : List (List α)} {l1 : List α} {hidx : idx' < l.length},
    (l.set idx' (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
      (l.set idx' l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take idx' (List.map List.length l)).sum + l1.length) elt
l1 hd : List α
tl : List (List α)
HR2 :
  ∀ {hidx : idx' + 1 < tl.length},
    (tl.set (idx' + 1) (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
      (tl.set (idx' + 1) l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take (idx' + 1) (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length) elt
hidx : idx' + 1 < (hd :: tl).length
⊢ hd ++ (tl.set idx' (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
    (hd ++ (tl.set idx' l1).flatten).insertIdx (hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length)
      elt

proof:
rw [@HR tl l1 (by simp at hidx; omega)]
          rw [show hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length = hd.length + ((List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length) from by omega]
          suffices h : ∀ (a b : List α) (k : Nat) (e : α), a ++ b.insertIdx k e = (a ++ b).insertIdx (a.length + k) e from h hd _ _ elt
          intro a b k e
          induction a with
          | nil => simp
          | cons h t ih =>
            simp only [List.cons_append, List.length_cons]
            rw [show t.length + 1 + k = (t.length + k) + 1 from by omega]
            rw [List.insertIdx_succ_cons]
            exact congrArg _ ih
successful_attempts:
rw [@HR tl l1 (by simp at hidx; omega)]
          rw [show hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length = hd.length + ((List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length) from by omega]
          suffices h : ∀ (a b : List α) (k : Nat) (e : α), a ++ b.insertIdx k e = (a ++ b).insertIdx (a.length + k) e from h hd _ _ elt
          intro a b k e
          induction a with
          | nil => simp
          | cons h t ih =>
            simp only [List.cons_append, List.length_cons]
            rw [show t.length + 1 + k = (t.length + k) + 1 from by omega]
            rw [List.insertIdx_succ_cons]
            exact congrArg _ ih
